BUSINESS HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling FlowRight Plumbing. How can we assist you today?
What brings you to call us today?
May I have your name and phone number, please?
I'm going to connect you with one of our plumbers. Please hold for just a moment.
We are dispatching the next available plumber and will call you shortly with status.
Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
Thank you for choosing FlowRight Plumbing. Have a great day!

AFTER HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling FlowRight Plumbing. Our office is currently closed. How can we assist you?
What is the reason for your call?
Is this an emergency, such as a gas line leak with odor?
I'm going to connect you with our emergency plumber. Can you please provide your name, phone number, and a brief description of the issue?
We are dispatching the next available plumber and will call you shortly with status.

We will be happy to assist you with your non-emergency issue. Can you please provide your name, phone number, and a brief description of the issue? What is your preferred callback window for tomorrow?
Thank you for calling FlowRight Plumbing. We will be in touch with you soon.

call_transfer_protocol.message_if_fails: We are dispatching the next available plumber and will call you shortly with status

tool_invocation_note: FieldEdge only, do not provide insurance coverage guidance
